name: python3-fonttools
title: python3-fonttools
summary: Converts OpenType and TrueType fonts to and from XML (Python 3 Library)
description:
Converts OpenType and TrueType fonts to and from XML (Python 3 Library)
FontTools/TTX is a library to manipulate font files from Python.
It supports reading and writing of TrueType/OpenType fonts, reading
and writing of AFM files, reading (and partially writing) of PS Type 1
fonts.  It also contains a tool called "TTX" which converts
TrueType/OpenType fonts to and from an XML-based format.
.
This is the Python 3 version of the fontTools package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-fonttools because Converts OpenType and TrueType fonts to and from XML (Python 3 Library).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-fonttools as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-fonttools with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-fonttools --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
